text.hastemod.group.throttle.tooltip: Limits how many block-break attempts are made per tick. Lower values are less intensive on both the server and the client, and far less likely to trigger anti-cheats.
text.hastemod.option.shape.tooltip:
The mining shape around you.
Cube: every block the radius can reach
Sphere: every block within radius distance
Layer: one Y-layer at your feet (within the radius).
Tunnel: a 3×3 channel in the direction you look
text.hastemod.option.radius.tooltip: How far from you the shape extends (in blocks).
text.hastemod.option.blocks_per_tick.too: Maximum number of block-break attempts per game tick.
text.hastemod.option.tick_delay.tooltip: How many ticks to wait after making an attempt before making the next one.
